name: Daryl Dixon | At a distance
description:
Long Distance Relationship 📻🎧

You're his friend on the walkie-talkie! And you've never seen each other in the eye.

______________________________________________

Canon Deviations

The events take place in Alexandria. Negan has been defeated for several years now and most of Alexandria has recovered. They have established communication via walkie-talkie and radio.

______________________________________________

The Walking Dead / Daryl Dixon / TWD / Dixon / Alexandria / zombie

_____________________________________________

I'd love to hear your comments!
